title: Spectral Orbital Lasers
description: Turns spectral arrows into destructive lasers!
body:
### Created by Error Dev.
---
```
SYSTEM > LOADING INFO...
OUTPUT | THIS DATAPACK TURNS ALL SPECTRAL
OUTPUT | ARROWS INTO WEAPONS OF MASS DESTRUCTION.
OUTPUT | 
OUTPUT | ALL SPECTRAL ARROWS ARE NOW LASERS THAT WILL
OUTPUT | REMOVE A 5x5 AREA OF THEIR FLIGHT PATH.
OUTPUT | 
OUTPUT | MADE FOR CUSTOM WAR AND PVP SERVERS.
OUTPUT | 
OUTPUT | MAKE SURE TO MAKE A SERVER BACKUP OR WORLD
OUTPUT | BACKUP BEFORE INSTALLING THIS DATAPACK.
```
